title: Cobblemon Frostbite
description: Hey! Are you annoyed about the worst ever pokemon mechanic called freeze? Today we have found the cure to RNG the status and replaced it with the Legends arceus version called frostbite which is special burn.
body:
Hey! Are you annoyed about the worst ever pokemon mechanic called freeze? Today we have found the cure to RNG the status and replaced it with the Legends arceus version called frostbite which is special burn. Have fun no longer dealing with Kyurem 10% freezing your Corviknight with freeze dry and sitting there for 8 turns to defrost. Its the fix to all freeze related issues

How it works:

- Frostbite inflicts 1/16 damage to the afflicted Pokémon at the end of turn (1/32 if the Pokémon has the Thick Fat Ability) 
- Frostbite now halves SpAtk (special Burn) 
- Removed Frozen Solid Mechanic

Inspired by how Radical Red did it so Shoutouts to them!
